Meta.title: About Us | Visit Vietnam
Meta.description: The Visit Vietnam Story — Connecting the world with the authentic beauty of Vietnam

Hero.subtitle: An intelligent travel technology platform where every journey is personalized, local culture is celebrated, and partners unite to build a sustainable ecosystem.

Pillars.title: 3 Pillars Shaping the Future
Pillars.subtitle: We apply the most advanced technology to solve the complex challenges of the travel industry, delivering real value to both travelers and businesses.

0.title: Personalization AI
0.desc: Artificial intelligence analyzes millions of data points to craft unique itineraries, destination recommendations, and experiences perfectly tailored to each individual's preferences, budget, and travel style.

1.title: Local Data Intelligence
1.desc: We own a massive, continuously verified database spanning all 63 provinces — from indigenous culture and local cuisine to hidden gems that have never appeared on mainstream platforms.

2.title: Connected Ecosystem
2.desc: A seamlessly integrated network of over 5,000 accommodation, travel, and OTA partners — both domestic and international — creating smooth transaction flows and centralized booking management across the industry.

Vision.label: Vision
Vision.title: To Become Southeast Asia's Leading Smart Travel Platform
Vision.desc: We aspire to reshape how the world discovers Vietnam, set new standards for travel technology, and firmly position Vietnam's tourism industry as a global leader.

Mission.label: Mission
Mission.title: Building Lasting Value for the Ecosystem

0.text: Deliver authentic, unique, and seamless local experiences.

1.text: Provide powerful digital tools that help partners optimize operations and grow revenue.

2.text: Contribute to heritage preservation, environmental protection, and indigenous community development.

Mission.quote: "Bringing Vietnam to the World, Bringing the World to Vietnam."

Problems.subtitle: We recognized the inherent pain points of traditional travel and committed to creating a comprehensive solution that completely transforms how you plan your next adventure.

0.title: Unreliable Information
0.desc: Fragmented, outdated data and fake reviews leave travelers confused and vulnerable to risks.

1.title: Disjointed Planning
1.desc: Spending hours across dozens of tabs searching for flights, hotels, and tours that don't sync together.

2.title: Hard to Access Local Culture
2.desc: Stuck visiting only mainstream spots — real local culture and authentic experiences are nearly impossible to find.

3.title: Language Barriers & Support Gaps
3.desc: Communication difficulties and slow customer support when things go wrong during your trip.

0.title: 100% Verified Data
0.desc: Information vetted by local experts, real photos, and transparent reviews — no more guesswork.

1.title: AI-Optimized Itineraries
1.desc: Generate a detailed plan in 3 seconds, automatically optimized for travel distances and opening hours.

2.title: All-in-One Booking
2.desc: Book accommodation, flights, attraction tickets, and manage your entire trip in a single app.

3.title: Multilingual AI Assistant 24/7
3.desc: Instant support in 6 languages, with you every step of the way to resolve any issue on the road.

Stats.title: Ecosystem at Scale
Stats.subtitle: Numbers that speak for themselves — a testament to the trust of our community.

Hero.title: A national platform connecting Vietnam travel businesses with global travelers
Hero.subtitle: Embracing authencity, building trust - a leading solution connecting businesses and travelers

Features.title: Unlock growth with Visit Vietnam
Features.subtitle: Leading digital travel platform: Smarter operations - Deeper insights - Revenue growth

0.title: Connect with global travelers
0.desc: Reach the right audience through high-quality, organic travel demand.

1.title: Optimize Vietnam travel with data
1.desc: Understand customer behavior and make faster, data-driven decisions.

2.title: A trusted Vietnam travel platform
2.desc: Strengthen your brand and boost conversion with trusted partners.

3.title: Join the ecosystem
3.desc: Connect, collaborate, and unlock cross-selling opportunities.

0.a: Visit Vietnam is a national digital travel platform that empowers Vietnam travel businesses to thrive in the digital era, connect directly with global travelers, and optimize operations through intelligent data.

1.a: Visit Vietnam operates on a performance-based model. Partners only pay service fees (commission) upon successful transactions.

2.q: How long does the approval process take?
2.a: The process typically takes 2–3 working days. Once all required information is submitted, the system will verify and activate your profile promptly.

3.q: What are the core benefits of becoming a partner?
3.a: Join the national ecosystem to elevate your Vietnam travel brand, access high-quality customers, and drive business growth through the platform.

4.q: How can my brand gain more visibility?
4.a: Partners can upgrade their tier to receive priority placement in premium positions and participate in large-scale national marketing campaigns.

5.q: How can I measure partnership performance?
5.a: Performance can be managed through an advanced dashboard, with periodic reports on reach, conversion rates, and detailed business performance by partnership tier.

Featured.title: Phu Quoc Named One of the World's Top 10 Islands for 2024
Featured.desc: Prestigious travel magazine Condé Nast Traveler has just released its list of the world's most beautiful islands, with Phu Quoc earning a spot for its pristine natural beauty and world-class resort offerings.

0.title: Exploring the Seafood Paradise at Phu Quoc Night Market
0.excerpt: From herring salad to grilled sea urchin — join us as we highlight the must-try dishes when you visit Pearl Island.

1.title: The Perfect 4-Day, 3-Night Itinerary for First-Time Phu Quoc Visitors
1.excerpt: Detailed planning from transportation and accommodation to activities across both the north and south of the island.

2.title: The Summer's Biggest Beach Music Festival Is About to Land
2.excerpt: Thousands of travelers are expected to gather at Bai Truong for a thrilling series of music and water sports events.

3.title: The Mediterranean Spirit of Vietnam's "Sunset Town"
3.excerpt: Marvel at the vibrant colorful streets and the iconic Kiss Bridge — Vietnam's newest tourism landmark.

4.title: The "Green Pearl Island" Campaign: Protecting Coral Reefs Together
4.excerpt: A sustainability initiative to conserve Phu Quoc's marine biodiversity and raise community awareness.

5.title: Hon Thom Cable Car Sets New Visitor Record
5.excerpt: The world's longest sea-crossing cable car continues to cement its status as a must-try experience in Vietnam.

6.title: Hoi An Named a Top Cultural Destination in Asia
6.excerpt: The ancient town of Hoi An continues to be recognized for its unique blend of traditional architecture and modern living.

7.title: Da Lat's Wild Sunflower Season — A Golden Highland Paradise
7.excerpt: In November, the hillsides around Da Lat are blanketed in golden wild sunflowers — a bucket-list experience.

8.title: Hanoi Street Food Ranked Among the World's Top 10
8.excerpt: CNN Travel names Hanoi among the world's best street food destinations for 2024.

9.title: Vietnam's First Personalized AI Travel App Launches
9.excerpt: Visit Vietnam officially launches its AI travel assistant — helping plan itineraries, suggest destinations, and book seamlessly.

10.title: Sapa's Water Season — The Golden Terraced Fields Spectacle
10.excerpt: September and October are the ideal months to witness the glittering golden terraced fields of Sapa and Mu Cang Chai.

11.title: Hue Festival 2024 — The Biggest Cultural Celebration in Central Vietnam
11.excerpt: This year's Hue Festival brings together hundreds of art troupes from across Vietnam and abroad, recreating the splendor of the ancient capital.

Testimonials.title: Real use, real reviews
Testimonials.subtitle: A growing number of travelers are choosing Visit Vietnam as they shape their way to travel Vietnam

items.content: Way more convenient than expected. I just typed what I wanted and got a full plan in minutes.
Some suggestions felt really local, I probably wouldn't have found those places on my own.
It kind of feels like someone who knows Vietnam is helping you out. The suggestions were actually spot on for what I like.
I didn't have to switch between apps at all. That alone made things easier.
I wasn't even looking for deals, but still ended up saving quite a bit just by following the suggestions.

Meta.title: Ba Na Hills | Visit Vietnam

Hero.subtitle: A heavenly escape featuring the legendary Golden Bridge, romantic French colonial architecture, and four distinct seasons all in one day.

Experiences.title: Signature Experiences at Ba Na Hills
Experiences.subtitle: The most loved activities and services among our travelers

0.title: Ba Na Hills Cable Car Ticket
0.description: Conquer the cable car system that holds 8 world records and gaze at the misty mountain peaks.

1.title: Fantasy Park + Amusement Zone
1.description: An indoor entertainment paradise with hundreds of games, 4D cinema, and roller coasters.

2.title: Golden Bridge + Flower Garden Tour
2.description: Stand on the bridge held aloft by giant stone hands — the most iconic photo spot in Southeast Asia.

3.title: Explore the French Village
3.description: Stroll through classic French colonial architecture recreating early 20th-century Europe amid the highland clouds.

4.title: Debay Wine Cellar
4.description: Savor premium wines aged in the most unique 100-year-old stone cellar in Southeast Asia.

5.title: Ba Na Carnival Festival
5.description: Immerse yourself in a vibrant street festival atmosphere with dance troupes, parades, and evening fireworks.

Meta.title: For Government | Visit Vietnam
Meta.description: Real-time tourism intelligence platform for government bodies, provincial tourism offices, and official agencies across Vietnam.

Hero.title: Real Tourism Data.
Hero.subtitle: Empower policy-making and tourism management with real-time, verified data from Vietnam's national travel platform.

PainPoints.title: Tourism Management is Harder Than It Needs to Be
PainPoints.subtitle: Government agencies face structural data gaps that slow down decision-making and policy response.

0.title: Fragmented Data
0.desc: Tourism statistics are scattered across dozens of departments and agencies with no unified view.

1.title: Slow Response Cycle
1.desc: Quarterly and annual reports arrive too late to respond to fast-moving traveler trends and incidents.

2.title: Behavioral Data Gap
2.desc: Spending patterns, route preferences, and traveler motivations remain largely invisible to planners.

DashboardFeatures.title: One Dashboard. Total Visibility.
DashboardFeatures.subtitle: Four integrated modules designed for tourism authorities, provincial offices, and national policy teams.

0.title: Market Overview
0.desc: Monitor real-time arrivals, revenue flows, and source market breakdowns at national and provincial level.

1.title: Destination Heat Map
1.desc: Visualize traveler density and movement patterns across all regions to identify overcrowding and emerging hotspots.

2.title: Spending Analysis
2.desc: Drill into per-category spending — accommodation, food, transport, activities — segmented by nationality and season.

3.title: Forecasting & Alerts
3.desc: AI-generated demand forecasts and automated alerts help agencies prepare for surges, shortfalls, and safety events.

0.title: Data-Driven Policy
0.desc: Replace anecdotal reporting with verified, real-time metrics that hold up to public scrutiny.

1.title: Evidence-Based Targeting
1.desc: Identify high-value source markets and seasonal patterns to allocate promotion budgets with precision.

2.title: Automated Reporting
2.desc: Export formatted compliance reports and briefings on demand — no manual compilation required.

Contact.successDesc: Our government relations team will contact you within 2 business days.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Common questions from government and official agencies.

0.q: Who can access the government dashboard?
0.a: Access is available to verified government bodies, provincial tourism offices, and authorized research institutions. All applications are reviewed by our government relations team.

1.q: How is data privacy and sovereignty handled?
1.a: All data is stored within Vietnam under compliance with Decree 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection. Individual traveler data is aggregated and anonymized before any reporting.

2.a: Onboarding for government agencies typically takes 5–10 business days, including access provisioning, data scope agreement, and a guided orientation session.

3.q: Can the platform integrate with existing government systems?
3.a: Yes. We provide secure API endpoints compatible with common government data interchange standards. Custom integration scoping is available on request.

4.a: Government accounts receive a dedicated account manager, priority support SLA, and quarterly business reviews with our policy analytics team.
